title: Integrate Sentry error reporting via Oban's official integration
prompt: Write `MyApp.Application.start/2` that configures Sentry error reporting for Oban. Use `Sentry.Integrations.Oban.ErrorReporter.attach/0` (the official integration, not a custom telemetry handler) from the `sentry` package — this is the idiomatic solution. Also add a `Sentry.Integrations.Oban.Cron.attach/0` to instrument cron plugin events. Include a comment explaining why using the official integration is preferred over a custom `:telemetry.attach/4` handler: the official version handles Oban's internal event names and metadata shapes correctly across Oban versions, and it uses a single handler id so it's not re-attached if the app restarts. Write to `lib/my_app/application.ex`.
tier_rationale: Specific knowledge of the Sentry package's Oban integration modules — a real-world production need. Vanilla Sonnet reaches for custom handlers.
research_citation: Oban Ready for Production HexDocs — 'Some libraries like AppSignal, ErrorTracker or Sentry automatically handle these events without requiring any extra code on your application.'
